name: Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons oat flour (or powdered rolled oats)
4 tablespoons dried chopped onion (or 1/4 cup fresh onion)
pinch of salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the oat flour with enough water to form pancake batter.
2. Add the onions, potatoes, salt, and pepper to the batter.
3. Spray a non-stick pan with Pam and place it over medium heat.
4. Lightly cover the pan with a paper towel.
5. Spoon the batter into the pan to form 3 or 4 large pancakes.
6. Cook on the first side until the bottom is golden brown with a few darker spots (peek occasionally).
7. Turn the pancakes over and cook the other sides for the same amount of time.
Serve with unsweetened natural applesauce.
